summary: Target-facing scout evidence for the Python v0.19.0..v0.20.0 auto-port. This fixture pins Python v0.19.0 and Rust 0.4.0 as previous baselines, Python v0.20.0 and Rust 0.5.0 as targets, maps the 249 changed Python paths to Rust implementation/test/docs/evidence targets, and requires workflow primitive, compiler authority, schema epoch, lane, request-context, runtime-effect, Blueprint, CLI run-once removal, docs, release, and web-package guardrails before downstream slices can close.

blueprint_contract.closure_rule: same-lineage closure remains suppressed until Blueprint and generated execution work drains

non_live_guarantees: no live Python execution beyond checked-out ../millrace-py diff inspection
